top_quotes.text: I go nowhere else for my music! The playlist Spotify builds for you? Wouldnt miss a beat!!!

Spotify is my favorite app and probably the thing I use the most every day. I listen to music when Im at school, at home, working out, or just relaxing. It has almost every song I want to hear, and its really easy to make playlists and discover new music. The recommendations are always good, and I l

What happened to Spotify? Why is a specific playlist include random songs not relevant to the category? Im bumpin to 2000s hip hop mix then a random non-hip hop song plays in the same playlist. Just ruins the vibe Im expecting. Why bump up subscription prices when youre not making the experience bet

Gng stop adding random songs to my playlist also let me play the songs I want bro idc about the ads im not paying for premium and make the songs in a list order instead of showing me the names of them i promise you i already know the names

Spotify is now no longer a service to find real artists. every week they flood your front page and playlist recommendations with their ai generated slop so they can pay artists even less than they already do. Absolutely disgusting.

Playlisting is pissing me off. If i want someone else to tell me what to listen to, ill listen to radio. If i want to listen to 1 artist the whole day, this is not your business. Has the widest variety of music. Premium comes free for 3 months every 5 months or so. That's an amazing bonus.
